title: The Second Life Newser Office
desc: Designed by Ranchan Weidman, this destination is the main office of the Second Life Newser, "Your source of news about the people, places, and events across Second Life." Run by Bixyl Shuftan and Gemma Cleanslate, visit them at slnewser.blogspot.com

title: Virtual Community Radio
desc: Streaming to the Metaverse and Beyond: Virtual Community Radio provides a varied program of light classical to more eclectic genres 24/7. VCRadio also produces regular features aimed at listeners in virtual worlds, and listeners on the wider Internet. Learn more, including additional tune-in information, at vcradio.org.

title: SL Enquirer
desc: The SL Enquirer is the longest-running freelance media source in Second Life, covering virtual world news since 2005. They specialize in business, entertainment, and virtual culture news. Visit them at slenquirer.com.

title: Unboxing Studios
desc: Unboxing Studios is a creative production house by Velbons and Blanche. Home to UNBOXING, UNPLUGGED, BUSTED, and more. It's a space for machinima productions and creative collaborations.

title: Illuminating Machinima at SLEA
desc: Calling all machinima artists! Step into SLVCG's 2nd Annual Illuminating Machinima at SLEA, a full region designed as a cinematic playground, featuring four unique, genre-themed environments by talented designers and artists. Explore a haunted swamp, a vibrant waterfront skate park, an anime-inspired toon land, and a neon-lit Neo Japan city. Capture your next story and bring your vision to life!

title: Bayjou Theater in Bay City
desc: This grand old theater, located in downtown Bay City, features the finest in machinima movies around the clock. Come on down to enjoy up to 12 hours of movies with no repeats, covering a wide variety of entertainment and informational subjects.

title: Designing Worlds Studio
desc: This studio is the home of Designing Worlds - a weekly TV show about design and designers in virtual worlds. During their regular seasons, you can join their viewing parties at 2pm SLT every Monday. But you can watch a show anytime just by clicking on the screen! Learn more at primperfect.net

title: Tankflix Theater
desc: With an extensive movie selection encompassing various genres, Tankflix Movie Theater caters to diverse tastes within the virtual landscape. From action-packed blockbusters to heartfelt dramas and timeless classics, the theater constantly updates its virtual movie listings to ensure a dynamic array of cinematic offerings. Special events, themed movie nights, interactive screenings, and collaborations with creators elevate the movie-watching experience, pushing the boundaries of what virtual cinema can achieve and solidifying Tankflix Movie Theater as a go-to destination for cinephiles in the metaverse.

title: Second Life Cinema
desc: Experience the magic of machinima at the Second Life Cinema! With regular events and an ever-changing roster of videos, it's a must-visit for film enthusiasts in Second Life. Remember to enable your media, turn up the volume under Sound & Media Preferences, and toggle the play/pause button to watch the movies here. Currently playing SL Video Creators Group’s Hot Off the Render for April 2026!

title: XRadio HQ
desc: XRadio, the Worldwide Superstation, is an internet radio freeform music station streaming live at XRADIO.ZONE and popular in virtual worlds like Second Life. The forty-meter Tower of Power spreads their signal throughout the metaverse. Auto DJ programming includes rock, rap, rave, and remixes. For more information, visit XRadio.Zone

title: South 40 Drive-In yUqvJuId
desc: Come home for the holidays at South 40 Drive-In! Stop by to watch a holiday movie, ice skate on the pond, or just relax and watch the snow come down! Happy Holidays, y'all!

title: The Kubrick Rooms
desc: Meticulously crafted sets inspired by the films of Stanley Kubrick. This destination is PBR-enabled.

title: Primfeed
desc: Primfeed is the only social media for Second Life Residents. Upload your pictures, share your thoughts, follow your loved creators, and more. Its unique features are specially designed for residents' needs. Create an account for free only with your avatar name. Learn more at primfeed.com

title: Weekly Old Time Radio Shows
desc: Everybody come and have a seat in the living room and enjoy a couple of hours of old-fashioned entertainment as we play old radio shows from the 1930s, 1940s, and 1950s. A fun crowd and a fun time for all. Lots of banter and commentary. The main room is "vintage" and proper mid 20th century attire is required on a human avatar if you want to sit there. From 4:30 to 6:30 p.m. (Pacific).

title: Multi Media Arts Center
desc: Established in 2007, the Multi Media Arts Center is a four region corner build with multiple venues presenting omnibus arts and multicultural entertainment to Second Life's diverse and inclusive global community. Learn more at www.TheMMACsl.com

title: Film Threat
desc: Meet with other film lovers from around the world in the official Film Threat venue -- your ticket to virtual cinema screenings, fan meetups, and more! The founder of Film Threat, Chris Gore, will host virtual panels with leading filmmakers, actors, and Film Threat critics.
